title: New Knowledge
subtitle: Review newly learned knowledge and roll back anything the AI applied automatically.
selectItem: Select an item from the list
rejectReasonPlaceholder: Why are you rejecting this decision?
shortcutHint: Shortcuts: j/k to navigate, a to approve, r to reject

conflict.tooltip: A human edited this page after the AI decided to auto-apply. Review carefully.
conflict.bannerBody: A reviewer saved a new revision on {{editedAt}} after the classifier picked this target, so auto-apply was held back.
conflict.approveWarning: Approving will create a new AI revision on top of the human's edits. Reject and re-run classification if the incoming content is no longer relevant.

destructive.title: Destructive change
destructive.deleteBody: This will move "{{title}}" and its child pages to trash.
destructive.mergeBody: This will promote the merged revision on "{{title}}" and move {{count}} source page(s) to trash.
destructive.warning: This approval cannot be undone in v1.

override.title: Decision override
override.invalidatesRevision: Changing action or target clears the AI-proposed revision; approval will regenerate from the current target.

detail.noCandidates: No candidate pages — this was treated as a new page.
detail.noDecisions: This ingestion has no decisions yet.
